title: $24k gain in the past week from low-priced stocks — still figuring out my edge
author: Double_Might_2818
selftext:
Had a strong week trading small-cap and low-priced stocks, ended up with a $24k gain

Even with this gain, I’m still learning and refining my process — some decisions are instinctive, some are based on patterns I’ve noticed over time

It feels good, but I know consistency is the real challenge

For anyone who’s been here: how do you turn a lucky streak into a repeatable process? Would love to hear your thoughts

comments.author: PostAntique8408
comments.body: I'd like to know what your method is convenient to share with me?

comments.author: Independent-Tea-1667
comments.body: I'm very interested in your method

comments.author: FantasticShine4012
comments.body: Send me your logic and i can test it on my scanners

replies.author: Double_Might_2818
replies.body: It’s not super complex honestly   mostly momentum + volume spikes on small caps
